steps.title: Apply the prompt's assumption
steps.content: The question assumes P7 gave equal actual ratings to impressionist and color-field paintings. It then asks what the model predicted, so the answer should compare the model's predicted ratings for those two styles.

steps.title: Rule out unsupported directions
steps.content: B and D claim a specific higher or lower preference that the data do not establish. C says the model predicted equal ratings, which conflicts with the indicated difference. The supported claim is simply that the predicted ratings differed. The answer is A.
